arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham reborn: How Real Madrid got Euros 'scapegoat' firing again in time to take down Liverpool
arts.sum: PETE JENSON: It had been a long time coming but finally on November 9 a chorus of 'Hey Jude' echoed around the Santiago Bernabeu. Bellingham was back in his best position.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits Kylian Mbappe dilemma could hand Liverpool Jude Bellingham surprise
arts.sum: The Liverpool coach has been looking ahead to the huge game at Anfield on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Man City must 'show character' after Feyenoord collapse says Nathan Ake before Liverpool test
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s crisis-stricken side head to Anfield after five straight losses followed by throwing away a 3-0 lead late in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Feyenoord fans tease Manchester City supporters at the Etihad with Arne Slot chant
arts.sum: The traveling Feyenoord supporters made themselves heard in the Etihad Stadium on Tuesday night. It’s estimated that more than 3,000 fans made the trip from Rotterdam to the North of England…

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Liverpool face Real Madrid in the Champions League on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and live stream and more.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola worried by mentally ‘fragile’ City as trip to Liverpool looms
arts.athr: Jamie Jackson at the Etihad Stadium
arts.sum: ‘I don’t know if it is mental,’ says manager after blown lead Guardiola must lift City after Feyenoord’s late fightback Pep Guardiola admitted his “fragile” Manchester City side face a tough season and that he must lift the players for their trip to Liverpool on Sunday after they allowed a 3-0 lead against Feyenoord to slip to 3-3 in Tuesday’s Champions League game. The draw ended a five-match losing sequence but, after cruising at 75 minutes with two Erling Haaland goals and one from Ilkay Gündogan, City capitulated as a panic set in and Anis Hadj Moussa, Santiago Giménez and David Hancko scored to claim a point for the visiting side. Hadj Moussa and Giménez finishes were initiated by loose Josko Gvardiol passes, while Hancko’s equaliser came after Ederson rushed out and missed the ball. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s sensational record against Champions League opponents Liverpool
arts.sum: Real Madrid travel to Anfield to take on Liverpool in the Champions League on Wednesday with a depleted squad, with Vinicius Jr the latest in a long line of first-team stars to be struck by injury. Of the others, they won two group stage games in 2014/15, the first leg of the quarterfinal in 2020/21 and both legs of last season’s round-of-16 tie.

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Real Madrid combined XI: Reds dominate central defence, Mohamed Salah and Jude Bellingham are shoo-ins, but which Champions League-winning Anfield star misses out?
arts.sum: The Anfield fixture is the kind of clash-of-the-titans encounter Champions League bosses would have dreamed of when they made the new league format and is a repeat of the 2018 and 2022 finals.
